title: pterospartum tridentatum var. lasianthum
benefits: Pterospartum tridentatum var. lasianthum has many benefits, such as promoting cardiovascular health by reducing cholesterol levels and preventing blood clots, which can help lower the risk of heart disease and stroke. parts: Pterospartum tridentatum var. lasianthum has many medicinal parts, such as its leaves, which are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, including quercetin and kaempferol, known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's roots and stems are known to contain iridoid glycosides, specifically catapol and lasianthoside, which have been found to have antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The flowers of Pterospartum tridentatum var. lasianthum contain triterpenoid saponins, such as lasianthoside A and B, which have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects.
